ChangeRequest.name: [IReF] Rename Other loans to Term loans and other loans
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
# Overview To investigate if _Other loans_ should be renamed to _Term loans and other loans_
### Contact person - @Arjan.Bos (BIRD) - @Olivia.Hauet (IReF) - Arek.Wyka@ecb.europa.eu (AnaCredit)
### Business definition
Arek: > I’d like to put forth another suggestion regarding the classification of loans. It seems that redefining ‘other loans’ to a more descriptive term, such as ‘term loans and other loans’, could be advantageous. The current category ‘other loans’ can be misleading, as it suggests that term loans, which are in fact a standard lending product, are a residual category of loans.
### Legal definition _[Legal reference]_
### Reason for inclusion _[Justifications]_
